tariff_system: TIGIE (Tarifa de la Ley de los Impuestos Generales de Importación y de Exportación)
system_type: General Tariff Schedule for Import and Export
summary: Mexico uses 10-digit TIGIE codes (8-digit HS base + 2-digit NICO/LIGIE extensions). Total of 12,498 tariff codes organized in 22 sections and 98 chapters.

data_availability.official_source: SNICE (Sistema Nacional de Información Comercial Exterior)

sources.name: SNICE - Official Source
sources.description: Mexican government system for commercial exterior information

sources.name: SNICE LIGIE Database
sources.description: Complete TIGIE tariff codes and LIGIE classifications

sources.name: TARIFF SCHEDULE OF MEXICO (OAS)
sources.description: PDF version of Mexico's tariff schedule

sources.name: SPARX Logistics
sources.description: Detailed explanation of TIGIE and LIGIE systems

tariff_rates.note: Duty rates vary by product type and trade agreement status (USMCA, etc.)

download_method: Access SNICE LIGIE database directly for complete 12,498 codes
next_steps: Navigate to LIGIE section for complete tariff codes
Compile duty rates for all codes
notes: SNICE is the official Mexican government source. Complete 12,498 codes available. May require registration for bulk exports. OAS SICE website provides alternative access to tariff schedule.
